testcase.name: test_get_loyalty_status

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain 'points' field assert 'points' in {'bonus_percent': 0, 'current_level': {'bonus_percent': 0, 'icon': '#x1F31F', 'level': 1, 'name': 'Starter', ...}, 'current_streak': 0, 'next_level': {'bonus_percent': 5, 'icon': '⭐', 'level': 2, 'name': 'Regular', ...}, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_priority2_features.py:275: in test_get_loyalty_status assert "points" in data, "Response should contain 'points' field" E AssertionError: Response should contain 'points' field E assert 'points' in {'bonus_percent': 0, 'current_level': {'bonus_percent': 0, 'icon': '#x1F31F', 'level': 1, 'name': 'Starter', ...}, 'current_streak': 0, 'next_level': {'bonus_percent': 5, 'icon': '⭐', 'level': 2, 'name': 'Regular', ...}, ...}

testcase.name: test_get_loyalty_tiers
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_priority2_features.py:290: in test_get_loyalty_tiers assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_claim_daily_bonus
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_priority2_features.py:317: in test_claim_daily_bonus assert response.status_code in [200, 400], f"Expected 200 or 400, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 or 400, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in [200, 400] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_claim_daily_bonus_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401/403 without auth, got 404 assert 404 in [401, 403] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_priority2_features.py:335: in test_claim_daily_bonus_requires_auth assert response.status_code in [401, 403], f"Expected 401/403 without auth, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401/403 without auth, got 404 E assert 404 in [401, 403] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_leaderboard_month

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain 'period' field assert 'period' in [{'avatar_url': None, 'level': {'bonus_percent': 0, 'icon': '#x1F31F', 'level': 1, 'name': 'Starter', ...}, 'total_stamps': 0, 'total_visits': 0, ...}, {'avatar_url': None, 'level': {'bonus_percent': 0, 'icon': '#x1F31F', 'level': 1, 'name': 'Starter', ...}, 'total_stamps': 0, 'total_visits': 0, ...}]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_priority2_features.py:349: in test_get_leaderboard_month assert "period" in data, "Response should contain 'period' field" E AssertionError: Response should contain 'period' field E assert 'period' in [{'avatar_url': None, 'level': {'bonus_percent': 0, 'icon': '#x1F31F', 'level': 1, 'name': 'Starter', ...}, 'total_stamps': 0, 'total_visits': 0, ...}, {'avatar_url': None, 'level': {'bonus_percent': 0, 'icon': '#x1F31F', 'level': 1, 'name': 'Starter', ...}, 'total_stamps': 0, 'total_visits': 0, ...}]

testcase.name: test_get_leaderboard_week

failure.message: TypeError: list indices must be integers or slices, not str

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_priority2_features.py:376: in test_get_leaderboard_week assert data["period"] == "week", f"Expected period 'week', got {data['period']}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: list indices must be integers or slices, not str

testcase.name: test_get_leaderboard_all_time

failure.message: TypeError: list indices must be integers or slices, not str

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_priority2_features.py:389: in test_get_leaderboard_all_time assert data["period"] == "all", f"Expected period 'all', got {data['period']}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: list indices must be integers or slices, not str

testcase.name: test_loyalty_status_after_daily_claim
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_priority2_features.py:436: in test_loyalty_status_after_daily_claim initial_points = status_response.json()["points"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'points'
